Thus, correct semantic equivalence is: torch.hstack([t1, t2]) ≡ torch.cat([t1.unsqueeze(1), t2.unsqueeze(1)], dim=1) for 1D inputs. Hence, per MindSpore docs and error, concat(axis=1) requires tensors with rank ≥ 2.
